issues.description: Text states '[Your Turn]' which indicates the effect lasts during your turn only. Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. These are different mechanics: DuringYourTurn persists through your turn phase, while EndOfTurn expires at turn end.
Target should specify the card name filter 'Portgas.D.Ace' in the target scope for precision, though 'ChooseOwnCharacter' is functionally acceptable if name filtering is handled elsewhere.
